summary: Added EmptyStateEditor component and wired it into the CMS admin UI. EmptyStateEditor matches the CTAEditor/HeroEditor pattern exactly: typed content interface, typed props, handleChange helper, two input fields (heading required, subheading optional). BlockEditorModal gets the import, the label entry, and the switch case. CMSEditor gets the label and amber color badge. Content shape matches the seed: { heading: string, subheading: string }. TypeScript compilation clean.
notes_for_reviewer: subheading uses a plain text input (not textarea) because the seeded content is a short one-liner and the spec says 'text input, optional'
heading uses required attribute on the input element to match the spec's 'required' annotation
